mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status != 'DELETED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT plan AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM users WHERE status != 'DELETED' GROUP BY plan ORDER BY count DESC, plan
SELECT status AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM application_case GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC, status

SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, fa.missing_skills, fa.fit_score, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, fa.matched_skills, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.strategy, fa.status FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id ) ORDER BY fa.created_at DESC, fa.id DESC

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS usage_date, COALESCE(SUM(token_usage), 0) AS token_usage, COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) AS credit_used FROM ai_usage_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY usage_date

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AS source, fa.id AS ref_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, fa.status, fa.error_message, fa.model, 0 AS retryable, fa.created_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.status != 'SUCCESS'
UNION ALL
SELECT run.analysis_type AS source, run.id AS ref_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, NULL AS company_name, NULL AS job_title, run.status, run.error_message, run.model, run.retryable, run.created_at FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id WHERE run.status != 'SUCCESS' ) failures ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT run.*, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id WHERE run.id = #{runId}

SELECT memo.id, memo.career_analysis_run_id, memo.admin_user_id, users.name AS admin_name, users.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_career_run_memo memo INNER JOIN users ON users.id = memo.admin_user_id WHERE memo.career_analysis_run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY memo.updated_at DESC, memo.id DESC

SELECT memo.id, memo.career_analysis_run_id, memo.admin_user_id, users.name AS admin_name, users.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_career_run_memo memo INNER JOIN users ON users.id = memo.admin_user_id WHERE memo.id = #{id} AND memo.career_analysis_run_id = #{runId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_career_run_memo (career_analysis_run_id, admin_user_id, memo_type, content) VALUES (#{careerAnalysisRunId}, #{adminUserId}, #{memoType}, #{content})
